post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Revoke the current access token, effectively logging out.

schema.title: Response Seed Demo Users Api V1 Auth Seed Post

get.description: List all users with pagination and filters (admin only).

post.description: Create a new user (admin only).

get.description: Get a single user by ID (admin only).

delete.description:
Delete user data for GDPR right-to-erasure compliance.

Admin-only. Permanently removes user record and clears associated
Redis tracking data. Cannot delete own account.

get.description: List items with pagination and optional filters.

post.description: Create a new item.

get.description: Get an item by database ID.

delete.description: Delete an item by database ID.

post.description:
Create a chat completion (streaming or non-streaming).

When body.stream is True, returns SSE StreamingResponse.
When body.stream is False, returns ChatCompletionResponse.

Args:
    request: The incoming HTTP request (used for rate limiting).
    body: Chat completion request with messages.
    service: Chat service instance (injected).
    _current_user: Authenticated user (injected, enforces auth).

Returns:
    Chat completion response or SSE streaming response.

get.description:
List available models including tier-routed models.

Returns the currently configured AI provider and model information
in OpenAI-compatible format.

Returns:
    Dictionary with model list in OpenAI-compatible format.

schema.title: Response List Models V1 Models Get

get.description: Get a specific memory entry.

post.description: Promote a DCG note into Hub memory (4.9.7 bridge).

Generate Maizzle email HTML from a campaign brief.

When body.stream is True, returns SSE StreamingResponse.
When body.stream is False, returns ScaffolderResponse with HTML
and optional QA results.

Args:
    request: The incoming HTTP request (used for rate limiting).
    body: Scaffolder request with brief and options.
    service: Scaffolder service instance (injected).
    _current_user: Authenticated admin or developer user (injected).

Returns:
    Scaffolder response or SSE streaming response.

Enhance email HTML with dark mode support.

When body.stream is True, returns SSE StreamingResponse.
When body.stream is False, returns DarkModeResponse with enhanced HTML
and optional QA results.

Args:
    request: The incoming HTTP request (used for rate limiting).
    body: Dark mode request with HTML and options.
    service: Dark mode service instance (injected).
    _current_user: Authenticated admin or developer user (injected).

Returns:
    Dark mode response or SSE streaming response.

Generate or refine email marketing copy.

When body.stream is True, returns SSE StreamingResponse.
When body.stream is False, returns ContentResponse with generated
text alternatives and spam warnings.

Execute a named blueprint and return the full run result.

Synchronous for v1 — progress is included in the response body.

get.description: Aggregated failure pattern statistics with optional filters.
List failure patterns from blueprint runs with optional filters.
Root endpoint providing API information.

build_id.title: Build Id
build_id.description: Email build to submit for approval

BlueprintProgress.title: BlueprintProgress
BlueprintProgress.description: Progress entry for a single node execution within a blueprint run.

brief.title: Brief
brief.description: Campaign brief or instructions for agentic nodes

persona_ids.title: Persona Ids
persona_ids.description: Target audience persona IDs — agents will adapt output for these clients

BlueprintRunRequest.title: BlueprintRunRequest
BlueprintRunRequest.description: Request to execute a named blueprint.

BlueprintRunResponse.title: BlueprintRunResponse
BlueprintRunResponse.description: Response from a completed blueprint run.

BuildRequest.title: BuildRequest
BuildRequest.description: Request to build an email template.

CapabilityFeasibilityResponse.title: CapabilityFeasibilityResponse
CapabilityFeasibilityResponse.description: A single capability's feasibility and competitive status.

ChatCompletionRequest.title: ChatCompletionRequest
ChatCompletionRequest.description:
Request body for the chat completions endpoint.

Attributes:
    messages: List of messages in the conversation (at least one required).
    model: Optional model override (ignored in MVP, uses server config).

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description:
A single message in a chat conversation.

Attributes:
    role: The role of the message sender.
    content: The text content of the message.

brand_voice.title: Brand Voice
brand_voice.description: Brand voice guidelines from project settings

ContentRequest.title: ContentRequest
ContentRequest.description:
Request body for the content generate endpoint.

Attributes:
    operation: The copywriting operation to perform.
    text: Source text or campaign brief.
    tone: Target tone for tone_adjust, optional hint for others.
    brand_voice: Brand guidelines loaded from project settings.
    num_alternatives: Number of alternatives to generate.
    stream: Whether to return SSE streaming response.

preserve_colors.title: Preserve Colors
preserve_colors.description: Hex colours that should not be remapped

DarkModeRequest.title: DarkModeRequest
DarkModeRequest.description:
Request body for the dark mode process endpoint.

Attributes:
    html: Existing email HTML to enhance with dark mode support.
    color_overrides: Optional mapping of light-mode hex colours to dark-mode hex colours.
    preserve_colors: Optional list of hex colours that should not be remapped.
    stream: Whether to return SSE streaming response.
    run_qa: Whether to run the 10-point QA gate on the enhanced HTML.

DocumentChunkResponse.title: DocumentChunkResponse
DocumentChunkResponse.description: Schema for a single document chunk.

DocumentContentResponse.title: DocumentContentResponse
DocumentContentResponse.description: Schema wrapping document metadata with its text chunks.

has_file.title: Has File
has_file.description: Whether the original file is stored on disk.

DocumentTagRequest.title: DocumentTagRequest
DocumentTagRequest.description: Schema for adding tags to a document.

DocumentUpdate.title: DocumentUpdate
DocumentUpdate.description: Schema for updating document metadata (PATCH semantics).

DomainListResponse.title: DomainListResponse
DomainListResponse.description: Schema for listing unique knowledge domains.

EmailClientResponse.title: EmailClientResponse
EmailClientResponse.description: Public email client metadata from ontology.

content_block_name.title: Content Block Name
content_block_name.description: Name for the ESP content block

ExportRequest.title: ExportRequest
ExportRequest.description: Request to export an email build to an ESP.

FailurePatternResponse.title: FailurePatternResponse
FailurePatternResponse.description: A failure pattern extracted from blueprint runs.

GraphEntityResponse.title: GraphEntityResponse
GraphEntityResponse.description: An entity from the knowledge graph.

GraphSearchRequest.title: GraphSearchRequest
GraphSearchRequest.description: Request body for graph knowledge search.

HandoffSummary.title: HandoffSummary
HandoffSummary.description: Summary of the last agent handoff in a blueprint run.

ItemUpdate.title: ItemUpdate
ItemUpdate.description: Schema for updating an item. All fields optional.

LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse
LoginResponse.description: Successful login response with JWT tokens.

MemoryCreate.title: MemoryCreate
MemoryCreate.description: Request to store a new memory entry.

MemoryPromote.title: MemoryPromote
MemoryPromote.description: Request to promote a DCG note into Hub memory.

PreviewRequest.title: PreviewRequest
PreviewRequest.description: Request for a live preview build.

target_clients.title: Target Clients
target_clients.description: Priority email client IDs from ontology (e.g. gmail_web, outlook_2019_win). QA checks all 25 clients; priority clients get prominent display and agent focus.

QACheckResult.title: QACheckResult
QACheckResult.description: Result of a single QA check.

QAOverrideRequest.title: QAOverrideRequest
QAOverrideRequest.description: Request to override failing QA checks.

QAResultResponse.title: QAResultResponse
QAResultResponse.description: Full QA result with individual checks.

template_version_id.title: Template Version Id
template_version_id.description: Template version ID for audit linkage

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Project ID for per-project QA config (optional)

QARunRequest.description: Request to run QA checks on compiled HTML.

baseline_test_id.title: Baseline Test Id
baseline_test_id.description: ID of the baseline rendering test

current_test_id.title: Current Test Id
current_test_id.description: ID of the current rendering test

RenderingComparisonRequest.title: RenderingComparisonRequest
RenderingComparisonRequest.description: Request to compare two rendering test results.

RenderingDiff.title: RenderingDiff
RenderingDiff.description: Visual diff result for a single client.

RenderingTestRequest.title: RenderingTestRequest
RenderingTestRequest.description: Request to submit a rendering test.

RoutingDecisionResponse.title: RoutingDecisionResponse
RoutingDecisionResponse.description: A single routing decision from the route advisor.

ScaffolderRequest.title: ScaffolderRequest
ScaffolderRequest.description:
Request body for the scaffolder generate endpoint.

Attributes:
    brief: The campaign brief describing the email to generate.
    stream: Whether to return SSE streaming response.
    run_qa: Whether to run the 10-point QA gate on the generated HTML.

SearchResponse.title: SearchResponse
SearchResponse.description: Search response with results and metadata.

SearchResult.description: Single search result with relevance score.
